titleStmt.title: SII 41.110: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 110. (A.R. No. 109 of 1905.) Maṉṉārkōyil, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Gōpālaśvamin temple at Maṉṉārkōil.

p.hi: Chōḻa Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman alias Sundara-Chōḻa-Pāṇḍya, Year 13 = 1034 A.D.

summary.p: Registers a sale of land measuring 14+vēli, consisting several pieces, by the sabha of Rājarājachadurvēdhimaṅgalam to the temple of Rājēndra Chōḻa-viṇṇagar-Paramaswāmikaḻ.
[Published in SII. Vol. XIV, No. 144 & Epigraphia Indica Vol. XI, page 292.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaiya paṉmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīcun=taracoḻapāṇṭiya devarkku yāṇṭu patiṉ mūṉṟāvatu śrīrājarājap pāṇṭināṭṭu muṭikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīrājarājac caruppetimaṅkalattu śrīrājendracoḻa viṇṇakar paramasvāmikaḷukku śrīrājarājac caturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom viṟṟukkuṭutta pūmiyāvatu Eṅkaḷpiṭākai pāmpunāṟi Iṭaikkuṉṟaveṭṭikku meṟkum śrīrājarājaviṇṇakar devar tevatāṉa
ttukkuk kiḻakkum taṇporuttamāṉa muṭikoṇṭa coḻapperāṟṟukku vaṭakkum śrīrājarājapperāṟṟukkut teṟkkum Āka Ivvellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa Irupū Āṟu pāyccal nilaṉ Āṟu veliyum mēṟpaṭi maḻukkāṭu nilaṉ muveliyum puṉcey maḻukkāṭu nilaṉ muveliyum Eṅkaḷurp paṭākai koṉāṭṭu Irupū Āṟup pāyccal nilaṉ Oṉṟey Eḻumāvum Ivvūrpiṭākai kaṭaiyattu pataiyāvilikāṭeṟṟu Orupū Aṟupāyccal nilaṉ Araiyum Ivvūr paṭākai pulakkuḷa
māṉa vārimāyileṭṭi Eripuṟaṅkarai Orupū nilaṉ Araiyum Ikkuḷattakam punir kovainilaṉ Araiyum Āka Irupū Āṟupāyccal nilaṉ Eḻemukkāley Iraṇṭumāvum mēṟpaṭi maḻukkāṭu nilaṉ muveliyum puṉcey maḻukkāṭu nilaṉ muveliyum Orupū nilaṉ Araiyum kuḷattil nirkovai nilaṉ Araiyum Āka nilaṉ patiṉāley mukkāley Iraṇṭumāvum viṟṟukkuṭuttom śrīrājendracoḻa viṇṇakar paramasvācāmikaḷukku śrīrājarājac caruppeti maṅkalattu mahāsabhai
yom . Ipparicu viṟṟukkuṭutta (1/2) bhūmikku Emmilicaiñca vilaip poruḷellāṅ kaiyyiley Aṟakkoṇṭu Ituvey vilaiOlaiyum poruḷ celaOlaiyumāvitākavum Itu vallatu veṟuvilai māvaṟutip poruḷcelaOlai kāṭṭak kaṭamaiyiṉṟi vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiolaiceytu niroṭu Aṭṭikkuṭuttom rājendracoḻa viṇṇakar paramasvāmikaḷukku śrīmahāsabhaiyom . Ipparicu viṟṟuk kuṭukkap paṇiccom śrīrājarāja
ccerik koṭṭaiyūrc caṅkaraṉ civatevapaṭṭac comāciyārum śrīmummuṭicoḻacceri tirupperan tevateveca nārāyaṇaṉum śrīarumeḻitevaccerik kirāñccimaheśvara kiramavittaṉum śrīnittaviṉotacceri korovi kāḷitāca paṭṭaccomāciyārum śrīcoḷentraciṅkacceri karāmpiṟceṭṭu śrītarapaṭṭaṉum śrīcuntaracoḻacceri korovi śrīmātavaccomāciyārum śrīvāṉavaṉmāteviccerik koṭṭattut tevatevecaṉ can=tiraṉumśrīuttamacoḻaccerik karippuṟattup poṟkku
mārak kiramavittaṉum śrīcempiyaṉmāteviccerik kiraṉūr coṉaippirāṉ cuppiramaṇiyapaṭṭaṉum śrīkun=tavacceri nimpai Iḷaiyanampipaṭṭaṉum śrīpañcavaṉmātaviccerik kuṇṭurt tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇak kiramavittaṉum śrīolokamātevicceri Iṭaiyāṟṟukkukuṭic comaṉakkaṉum Āka Ipparicu paṇiccu viṟṟukkuṭuttom śrīrājendracoḻaviṇṇakar paramasvāmikaḷukku śrīrājarājacaturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ koṭṭaiyūrccaṅkaraṉ civatevapaṭṭa
ccomāciyēṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ korovikāḷitātaccomāciyeṉ Ivai Eṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruppertevatevecnarāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kirāñcimaheśvarak kiramavittaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ śrītaṇūrkkecavaṉ centuppirāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kārampicceṭṭu śrītarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ koroliśrīmātavac comāciyeṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ nimpai Iḷaiyaṉampi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
Iruṅkaṇṭittevatevecapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ I kippuṟattuyaññaṉ Eḻuttu Itam vīrasyaputreṇa śāstamamla vāsinā . nārāyaṇena viditam bhakta bhaktena śārggiṇaḥ . Iti viditam śolaiprān subramaṇyena mahāsabhaiyārp paṇikka Ivvōlai Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr sabhaikkaraṇattāṉ cūṟṟicaṅkaraṉāṉa camaiñcappriyaṉeṉ Eḻuttu .m§
Digital edition of SII 41.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
